step_rationale: Calprotectin subunit; DAMP and alarmin driving plaque inflammation and neutrophil-platelet cross-talk.
mechanism: S100A9 (calprotectin) is a key alarmin amplifying vascular inflammation and thromboinflammation through monocyte recruitment and neutrophil-platelet interactions.
